# ThinkBench Skills

A collection of Claude skills I wrote for the thinking and writing workflows I use most. Each skill encodes a workflow I've found myself repeating, so I don't have to re-explain the process every time.

These are custom Claude skills targeting cognitive work rather than code generation or file manipulation — the kind of tasks where you need to compare, structure, draft, and refine ideas.

## Skills

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **[doc-merge](skills/doc-merge/SKILL.md)** [<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Import_to_Manus-white?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64," alt="Import to Manus">](https://manus.im/app#settings/skills/import?githubUrl=https://github.com/zkbkb/thinkbench-skills/tree/main/skills/doc-merge)| Multi-document semantic comparison and interactive merge resolution. Takes multiple documents on the same topic, diagnoses differences at multiple levels (framework, structure, argument, expression), and guides you through resolving conflicts into a single output. |
| **[context-handoff](skills/context-handoff/SKILL.md)** [<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Import_to_Manus-white?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64," alt="Import to Manus">](https://manus.im/app#settings/skills/import?githubUrl=https://github.com/zkbkb/thinkbench-skills/tree/main/skills/context-handoff) | Generates structured context handoff documents that compress a conversation's working state into a 12-module summary for seamless continuation in a new session. Inspired by Claude Code's `/compact` but redesigned for general-purpose conversations. Trigger: `/compact` / `/handoff` |
| **[transcript](skills/transcript/SKILL.md)** [<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Import_to_Manus-white?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64," alt="Import to Manus">](https://manus.im/app#settings/skills/import?githubUrl=https://github.com/zkbkb/thinkbench-skills/tree/main/skills/transcript) | Export the current conversation as a structured transcript file, preserving all user inputs and AI responses in chronological order. Outputs Markdown with YAML front-matter by default, with optional JSON output. Includes a format converter and validator script. Trigger: `/transcript` |
| **[doc-diff](skills/doc-diff/SKILL.md)** [<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Import_to_Manus-white?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64," alt="Import to Manus">](https://manus.im/app#settings/skills/import?githubUrl=https://github.com/zkbkb/thinkbench-skills/tree/main/skills/doc-diff) | Given two versions of the same document, produces a single continuous Markdown file with all changes marked inline using Obsidian-compatible syntax: `~~strikethrough~~` for deletions and `==highlight==` for additions. Supports optional `.diff` and `.txt` diff file output. |
| **[sutong-tutorial](skills/sutong-tutorial/SKILL.md)** [<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Import_to_Manus-white?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64," alt="Import to Manus">](https://manus.im/app#settings/skills/import?githubUrl=https://github.com/zkbkb/thinkbench-skills/tree/main/skills/sutong-tutorial) | Generate high-density knowledge speed-through tutorials that build deep understanding from first principles. Traces the growth logic of concepts — why they emerged, what problems they solve, and how they evolved — through a coherent problem-to-refinement narrative. Trigger: `sutong` / `速通` |

## Usage

**Claude (for example):**
1. Go to **Claude.ai** > **Settings** > **Profile** > **Custom skills**
2. Upload the skill folder
3. Claude will automatically discover and use the skill when your task matches

Each skill folder contains a `SKILL.md` (core instructions) and optionally a `references/` directory with supporting materials and an `assets/` directory with templates.

**Manus:**

1. Click the **Import to Manus** link above
2. Confirm the import in Manus settings

Each skill folder contains a `SKILL.md` (core instructions) and optionally a `references/` directory with supporting materials and an `assets/` directory with templates.

## Repository structure

```
thinkbench-skills/
├── skills/
│   ├── doc-merge/
│   │   ├── SKILL.md
│   │   ├── references/
│   │   └── assets/
│   ├── context-handoff/
│   │   ├── SKILL.md
│   │   └── references/
│   │       └── prompt-template.md
│   ├── transcript/
│   │   ├── SKILL.md
│   │   ├── references/
│   │   │   └── output-template.md
│   │   └── scripts/
│   │       ├── transcript_converter.py
│   │       └── transcript_validator.py
│   ├── doc-diff/
│   │   └── SKILL.md
│   └── sutong-tutorial/
│       ├── SKILL.md
│       └── references/
│           └── tutorial-template.md
└── README.md
```
